nasb.text: This is the disciple who is testifying to these things and wrote these things, and we know that his testimony is true.

esv.text: This is the disciple who is bearing witness about these things, and who has written these things, and we know that his testimony is true.

cnv.text: 為這些事作證，並且記述這些事的，就是這門徒；我們知道他的見證是真實的。

ccb.text: 为这些事做见证、记录这些事的就是那个门徒，我们都知道他的见证是真实的。

csbs.text: 正是这个门徒，为这些事做见证，并记下了这些事，而且我们知道他的见证是真实的。
